-- 2 of 13 --

A TSUNAMI-STYLE 4-PART CLOSE
‣ Most marketers only write one close inside a webinar, VSL or sales
letter… 	and this is a mistake.
‣ 	I often use a 4-Part Close: 	these are four distinct closes one
after the other, with simple transition phrases to set them up.
‣ The 4-Part Close leverages different aspects of the prospect’s
psychological state, as you don’t know for sure where he or she will
be at this point in the offer.
‣ Our focus areas will be 	fear, future, rights, and smarts. 	These
range from the deep subconscious states to the top-of-mind states.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 13 --

THE “FEAR” CLOSE (CROSSROADS)
‣ The Crossroads Close is one of the most famous closes. It’s used to
death, but it still works.
‣ 	The set-up is essentially two roads to take, and only one road is the
smart road 	(we are mixing two states here; fear and smarts, as
you feel smart answering ‘yes’, but will use ‘smarts’ by itself later)
‣ The fear is choosing the wrong road… however, the key to
amplifying the wrong road is 	leveraging ultimate fears 	(you did
this inside CopyPro.)
‣ What puts my version over the top is the use of 	The Socratic
Method 	to illicit the greatest amount of agreement (get the YES!)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 13 --

A FEAR (CROSSROADS) FRAMEWORK
Right now you are standing at a crossroads. A decision is mandatory. And the decision
you make will be one you live with for a lifetime.
To your left lies the road you’ve been on for far too long. Where do you think that road
will lead? Isn’t is wise to assume it can only lead to more of the same? Of course it is.
However, it’s even worse. If you keep going down the road you’re on now, you may end
up (ultimate fear.) Is it safe to say you want more out of your life than that? Yes it is.
That’s why you need to turn and look to your right. There’s the other road…the road that
leads to (primary goal)…to the life you and your family richly deserve to enjoy. To your
right is a road full of hope and fulfillment. And I’m walking that road, right beside you.
Will you join me on the road to (primary goal)?
(CTA)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 13 --

THE “FUTURE” CLOSE (NLP FUTURE PACE)
‣ We transition right out of the Fear close into the Future close with
the use of a simple sentence: 	Now, let’s look at your future
now 	that you’ve chosen the right road…
‣ 	Notice the redundant “now”s… this is setting an NLP command state
‣ The entire close paints a picture of the prospect’s life in the future,
but with all present tense language (future pacing).
‣ You’ll walk down your three Results Times (in CopyPro): short term,
mid term, and long term.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 13 --

A FUTURE PACED (NLP) FRAMEWORK
Now, let’s look at your future now that you’ve chosen the right road…
Can you believe it’s only been 7 days? You woke up this morning feeling leaner, more
energetic, and that bounce as you got out of bed? You’re not the only one who noticed it.
That kind of energy is contagious. (Play off what 	others see 	when you’re future pacing.)
Now it’s 3 weeks later… you caught a glance at yourself in the mirror and just for a
moment you swore it was someone else. “Damn, that’s a good-looking…oh, that’s me!” It’s
okay to say it…you look fantastic. You’re back in that pair of jeans you swore off a few
months back, and you’re turning heads left and right.
Now it’s 60 days later, and can you believe your life? Your health and energy are at an all-
time high. Your partner mentioned how you “look like you’re back in college”, and you
think back to yourself: 	“It all started when I trusted my gut and said YES to Jon…”
…just like you’re trusting it now…and saying 	YES to this future you!
(CTA)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 13 --

THE “RIGHTS” CLOSE
‣ We transition right out of the Future close into the Rights close with
the use of a frame reset: 	Let me ask you a question: how
important is your freedom to you? Can you put a price on it?
‣ 	This section is all about the freedom 	to choose 	and how it’s a
fundamental human right (your right to choose.)
‣ This touches on very deep core values, as well as a fear that most
older folks have (that their rights are being stripped away)
‣ You’ll see how all three closes are tied together into one narrative.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 13 --

A RIGHTS FRAMEWORK
Let me ask you a question:
How important is 	your freedom 	to you? Can you put a price on it?
If you value freedom the way I do, then let me share something personal with you.
I believe to my core that one of the greatest freedoms we both have…
…is the freedom to choose.
There are some who want to strip that freedom away from you. Many who want to force
you down 	the wrong road. 	You know this first-hand because you’ve been on that road
for some time now…
…so as you veer right today…down the right road…toward that future we both see for
you…remember this:
Today, you are exercising your divine right of CHOICE. 	That’s something to
celebrate and never take for granted. 	Choose now, and join me on that road:
(CTA)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 13 --

THE “SMARTS” CLOSE
‣ We transition right out of the Choice close into the Smarts close with
the use of a tie-down phrase: 	And speaking of smart choices…
‣ 	This section is all about the prospect’s intelligence and right to brag
to his/her family about making a wise decision.
‣ It subtly frames any other choice as one of ignorance.
‣ This taps into the logical side of the brain, but in an emotional way,
as we anchor loved ones and friends into the choice.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 13 --

A SMARTS FRAMEWORK
And speaking of smart choices:
Tonight is going to be a night to remember. When you sit down with your partner, your
friend, or maybe a coworker you look up to, you get to say something magical:
“Today I made 	a truly wise decision.”
“Today I took a step 	toward the life and legacy I deserve.”
“Today I get 	a second chance.”
Isn’t that what we deserve? A second chance? I believe all honest, hard-working folk
deserve a second chance when it comes to (goal)…don’t you?
Now, not everyone is smart enough to know when an opportunity has presented itself. Yet
you and I ARE… and we’ve seen what the next 60 days will look like for you…and we’re
smart enough 	to take the 	right road this time.
And you know what? The moment you click that button below, you’re on your way…
(CTA)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
